prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. Copy exact request evidence for semantic choices. Use only supplied identifiers. Return JSON only.

{"request_text":"For this data analytics work, assemble the source material, quality-check it, and send the finalized outcome and keep the finalized outcome for long-term records under standard assurance in structured JSON.","evidence_spans":{"e0":"For this data analytics work","e1":"assemble the source material","e2":"quality-check it","e3":"send the finalized outcome","e4":"keep the finalized outcome for long-term records","e5":"standard assurance","e6":"structured JSON"},"catalog":{"capabilities":[{"capability_id":"v08-p27-prepare","name":"Assemble data analytics source packet","description":"Collect the source material needed for data analytics.","aliases":["gather data analytics inputs","prepare data analytics packet","gather the inputs","prepare the data analytics packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":[],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["source_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p27-source"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p27-verify","name":"Validate data analytics source packet","description":"Check the assembled data analytics material for correctness.","aliases":["check data analytics inputs","verify data analytics packet","check the packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":["v08-p27-prepare"],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["source_bundle"],"output_modes":["checked_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p27-checked"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p27-deliver","name":"Publish data analytics verified brief","description":"Release the checked final brief for data analytics.
